response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance in the video as "Wishful☆Garnet" by Maon Kurosaki, performed by the VTuber duo FuwaMoco. 2. Performed a search for the lyrics of "Wishful☆Garnet" to ensure accuracy. 3. Used the search results to populate the metadata and lyrics for the JSON response. 4. Split the video into two scenes: the song performance and the subsequent speaking/outro.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a vocal performance of the song "Wishful☆Garnet" by the VTuber duo FuwaMoco, followed by an outro.

scenes.description: The VTuber duo FuwaMoco performs the song "Wishful☆Garnet" on a stage with fireworks and bubbles.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I wish for you to be smiling
Tomorrow, and the day after that too, always... lala...

Looking back at the past, I remember
The garnet sky, the overflowing light
That day reflected in these eyes
Sways beautifully
What do you think?

I made a wish to the sky, stained red
Please, let this wish come true
"I wish for you to be smiling
Tomorrow, and the day after that too
Even if we are separated
I hope you can keep facing forward
I will break the chains that bind you
Don't give up, keep moving forward
Because I will always be by your side"

Even when you're feeling down or lose confidence
You're right there in front of me
I've been saved many times by your smile
That's why... so I love you
If you feel like you're going to break down
Reach out your hand, and let's find
A tomorrow we don't know yet together

"I wish to shine upon you
Tomorrow, and the day after that too
When you feel like you're about to cry
I want you to turn this way
Don't think that you're all alone in this world
The person who loves you
Is surely always thinking of you"

Uh... yeah...
Wishful☆Garnet
Lala lala... la lala...
I made a wish
Please, let this wish come true!

"I wish for you to be smiling
Tomorrow, and the day after that too
Even if we are separated
I hope you can keep facing forward
I will break the chains that bind you
Don't give up, keep moving forward
To the shining sky
I wish for you to be smiling
Tomorrow, and the day after that too
Even if we are separated
I hope you can keep facing forward
I will break the chains that bind you
Don't give up, keep moving forward
Always by your side
By your side
Because I am always
Here for you"
Lalala... uh... yeah...
Yeah... yeah... yeah...
Lala...

scenes.description: The VTubers speak to the audience to thank them and promote their future content.
